name: Carrot, Orange & Radish Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 large Onion, cut into bite-sized chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine shredded carrots, onion chunks, radishes, and cilantro in a salad bowl.
2. Whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, orange juice, orange-blossom water, cinnamon, salt, and pepper in a separate container.
3. Pour the dressing over the salad and toss to combine.
4. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
5. Serve garnished with pita wedges.
